Interface ProblemPlugin<G>

All Superinterfaces:
Plugin
All Known Implementing Classes:
AlmostDisjunctMatrixProblemPlugin, BooleanFunctionMultiObjectiveProblemPlugin, BooleanFunctionPermutationProblemPlugin, BooleanFunctionProblemPlugin, BooleanFunctionTreeProblemPlugin, Cec2014ProblemPlugin, CocoBbobProblemPlugin, DisjunctMatrixProblemPlugin, DtlzProblemPlugin, GrammarCsvClassificationProblemPlugin, GrammarCsvRegressionProblemPlugin, GrammarMajorityProblemPlugin, GrammarNguyenRegressionProblemPlugin, GrammarXorProblemPlugin, KnapsackProblemPlugin, MaxSatProblemPlugin, MixedToyProblemPlugin, NguyenSymbolicRegressionProblemPlugin, OneMaxProblemPlugin, RastriginProblemPlugin, ResolvableMatrixProblemPlugin, RosenbrockProblemPlugin, SmallTspProblemPlugin, SphereProblemPlugin, TsplibTspProblemPlugin, ZdtProblemPlugin
public interface ProblemPlugin<G> extends Plugin
Plugin factory for optimization problems.
